text: According to the Hebrew text, ‘which did not continue with them’.

It seems to be implied in verses 26-30 that the tabernacle was now pitched outside the camp (cf. 10.33), not, as was customary, in the middle of it (2.2). Some think that Eldad and Medad were among the seventy; but this would contradict verse 24 above, and we are perhaps meant to understand that six elders were chosen from each tribe, so that the two persons in question were left behind when the seventy presented themselves before the tabernacle.
